value.fullName: New project. Submit application now to be included in lottery
value.label: New project. Submit application now to be included in lottery

value.fullName: Units available now. Small or no waiting list
value.label: Units available now. Small or no waiting list

value.fullName: Units available now and being filled from existing waiting list
value.label: Units available now and being filled from existing waiting list

value.fullName: No units available now. Units become available regularly. Small or no waiting list
value.label: No units available now. Units become available regularly. Small or no waiting list

value.fullName: No units available . Medium waiting list. Estimated waiting time is 1-2 years
value.label: No units available . Medium waiting list. Estimated waiting time is 1-2 years

value.fullName: No units available. Long waiting list. Estimated waiting time is 2 years or more
value.label: No units available. Long waiting list. Estimated waiting time is 2 years or more

value.fullName: CGP&H does not maintain waiting list. Contact complex directly.
value.label: CGP&H does not maintain waiting list. Contact complex directly.
